request_payload.exposure_text: Our national security is being undermined by foreign influence in our tech supply chains. While we focus on strategic autonomy, foreign actors are exploiting our openness. Just last year, a critical infrastructure project was compromised because we relied on unvetted components. We can't afford to be naive. It's time to prioritize security over short-term convenience. #NationalSecurityFirst
